body:
## Rationale

All major content types now have `/llms/` markdown coverage — drummers (61 files), articles, bands, comparisons, techniques, licks, gear-by-brand. **Top-10 lists are the only rich content type with no LLM surface.**

MetalForge has 8 top-10 lists in `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js`:
- `fastest-metal-drummers`
- `death-metal-drummers`
- `most-innovative-drummers`
- `thrash-metal-drummers`
- `drummers-with-budget-friendly-kits`
- `most-expensive-drum-setups`
- `fastest-double-bass-drummers`
- `most-brutal-drum-solos`

These pages have sitemap entries + ItemList schema (#1083 shipped). But AI assistants answering **"who is the fastest metal drummer"**, **"top death metal drummers"**, **"best budget drum kit for metal"** get no MetalForge content in the current /llms/ surface. This is exactly the query format AI overviews answer with ranked lists.

## Implementation

**New file:** `scripts/generate-llms-lists.cjs`

Pattern: mirrors `scripts/generate-llms-techniques.cjs` and `scripts/generate-llms-bands.cjs`.

Pull data from `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` (export `TOP_10_LISTS`). For each list:
```markdown
## Top 10 Fastest Metal Drummers

MetalForge ranks the fastest metal drummers by documented BPM capability and technical style.

### 1. George Kollias
George Kollias (Nile) holds the documented record at 280 BPM single strokes...
[continue for each ranked entry with name, band, key facts]
```

**Output:** `public/llms/lists.md`

**Files to update:**
- `public/llms/index.md` — add pointer to lists.md
- `api/sitemap.js` — add `{ loc: '/llms/lists.md', ... }` entry (matches existing llms pattern)
- `public/llms-full.txt` — include in the comprehensive dump (or re-run generator)

## Quality gate
- ≥ 300 words per list section
- Each ranked entry: name + band + key fact sentence (citeable by AI)
- Internal links: each entry links to `/llms/drummers/<slug>.md` equivalent or full site URL
- Plain Markdown, no HTML (for AI crawler ingestion)
- Frontmatter: `# MetalForge Top-10 Lists` H1 with site description lead paragraph

## Estimated organic uplift
Serves AI-citation queries: "fastest metal drummer", "top death metal drummers", "most innovative metal drummers", "best budget metal drum kit". These are head-term ranking queries AI assistants pull ranked lists for. Adds 1 LLM file = compound surface with zero conflict risk.

## Verify
1. `ls public/llms/lists.md` exists and is > 2KB
2. File opens in browser at `https://metalforge.io/llms/lists.md` (200)
3. `grep lists.md public/llms/index.md` returns a match
4. `grep /llms/lists.md api/sitemap.js` returns a match
5. Each of the 8 list sections has ≥ 3 ranked entries with name + band + fact

## Done
- [ ] `scripts/generate-llms-lists.cjs` created and run
- [ ] `public/llms/lists.md` committed
- [ ] index.md + sitemap updated
title: SEO: /llms/lists.md — 8 top-10 list pages missing from LLM citation surface
